Hanchinal”, the entry “Dr. Kumble Vinod Prabhu” shall be substituted. [F. No. 2-1/2016-SD.V] ASHWANI KUMAR, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), dated the 11th November, 2005, vide number S.O. 1589(E), dated the 11th November, 2005 and subsequently, amended vide number S.O. 1883(E) dated the 1st November, 2006, number S.O. 1316(E), dated the 11th May, 2009 number S.O. 3064(E), dated the 30th November, 2009 number S.O. 195(E), dated the 31st January, 2011 and number S.O. 2183, dated 7th October, 2013. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
